title: Uruguayan Aubergine Stir Fry
description: A simple and flavorful dish combining the best of Uruguayan and Asian cuisines. The gooey sauce adds a sweet and tangy twist.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add the sliced aubergine and stir-fry for 3-4 minutes, until it starts to soften.
Add the uruguayan seasoning blend and stir-fry for another minute.
Add the gooey sauce and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes, until the aubergine is coated.
Taste and adjust the seasoning with soy sauce and sesame seeds if desired.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
